description:
GIVEN a subscriber has SUBSCRIBERVOD entitlement
AND FLIVE content is present in the Hero

steps.action: WHEN a subscriber loads the Home page
steps.result:
THEN a related background image is displayed for the FLIVE content in the hero
AND a red pill with "LIVE" text displays left justified above the FLIVE title
AND the title for the FLIVE content in the hero is displayed
AND the description for non-game content in the hero is displayed
AND the "Watch Now" button is white with black text
AND the "Watch Now" button has focus when the Home page loads
AND the FLIVE content playback is successful after the user selects the "Watch Now" button
